form.formComment: At debut, held ground to the line finished second of 10 starters at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3000m, slow track; 1.5 len behind Nenette For Ever with 67kg at $8.40. Looks primed to run well.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after three months finished fourth of 11 starters at Auteuil on March 14 over 3000m, in the wet; 13 len behind In Between Days with 67kg at $13. Previously second-up finished fourth of 16 runners at Durtal on December 14 over 2000m, slow track; 2 len behind La Charmette carrying 56.5kg. Looks a great chance this time.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At long odds at debut, finished fourth of 10 starters at Chantilly All Weather on February 12 over 1600m, 17 len behind Wit carrying 53kg. Second-up finished sixth of 14 starters at this track on March 2 over 3200m, 19 len behind Lagenikodesbeaux carrying 67kg at $48. Might find this a bit tough.
